privileged_info_summary: The task uses the Natural Earth 110m Admin 0 Countries dataset (version 5.1.1), which contains 177 country and region records and is a real, publicly available dataset from https://naciscdn.org/naturalearth/110m/cultural/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.zip. Brazil is present in this dataset as the 21st country alphabetically. The task requires using QGIS's Print Layout Atlas feature, which is a documented and real feature in QGIS 3.x. The shapefile is downloaded automatically by the setup script from the NACIS CDN. No synthetic data is involved.
